data.title: diggie atp tricks and tips

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Ixia's movement limits puts it at a disadvantage. However, with Diggie as its companion, it compensates this by giving that survivability for repositioning,  damage, and also chase from its second skill.

Karrie is a hero that shines by mid to late game, much like Diggie. Considering its dash is short and positioning is key for Karrie, having Diggie around to safeguard Karrie and with the latter's damage, is pivotal in turning the game around.

counters.counter_desc: Diggie is a very squishy hero, and Joy's reach and the damage of the ultimate can easily burst Diggie.
Any damage that Diggie would do from harassing the enemy lane hero can easily be countered by Estes' heal.

dominants.dominant_desc: During the Mid Game or Late Game, Diggie will shine in every team fight as its skills gives the team that needed survival factor.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Cooldown reduction plays a big part as Diggie's skills are needed in clashes or team fights.

Likewise, Pull Yourself Together is a good battle spell for skills cooldown be less.

Lastly, Focusing Mark helps your team by providing an additional 6% damage for 3 seconds.
If you plan to have Diggie as a front, this emblem is good to have a sturdy survivability for Diggie.

equips.equip_desc:
Key Equipment is the Flask of Oasis and Fleeting Time.

You can interchange the Guardian helmet, Immortality, and Glowing Wand to any equipment that is being asked for the match up.

hero.hero_overview: Diggie is a support/roam hero that has for its main feature is its ultimate which purifies any crowd control , stun, taunt, and any other skill that causes control.
hero.hero_strength:
Lane - In the lane, it can provide pressure to enemy heroes as its first skill can provide both vision and damage.
Farm - When farming with the jungler, Diggie can use both first and second skill to provice damage and chase to enemy heroes.
Team Fight - During team fights, diggie removes any control skill that enemies would have temporarily and can provide the team a upperhand with both this, shield and heal.
hero.hero_weakness: As a support/roam, Diggie is a squishy hero and is susceptible to being picked off first. The role that Diggie has is crucial in team clashes or team fights, and if Diggie gets bursts by the enemy, it can put the team at a disadvantage.

spell.spell_desc: Diggie is needed in team fights, its positioning needs to be in the middle of the storm. Offense is the best defense. Using revitalize will give the team that extra heal also from the item the Flask of Oasis.

dominants.dominant_desc: To maximize Diggie damage as a mage. Start by poking auto alarm bomb, then follow up with reverse time for burst damage. Stay in the backline and use Flicker for quick repositioning when needed. Build items that boost Magic Power, CDR, and Magic Penetration and Holy Crystal, to amplify your output. Use Time Journey strategically for team protection and to set up aggressive plays, and manage your mana by using abilities wisely.

To maximize Diggie damage as a mage. Start by poking auto alarm bomb, then follow up with reverse time for burst damage. Stay in the backline and use Flicker for quick repositioning when needed. Build items that boost Magic Power, CDR, and Magic Penetration and Holy Crystal, to amplify your output. Use Time Journey strategically for team protection and to set up aggressive plays, and manage your mana by using abilities wisely.

emblems.emblem_desc:
The Mage Emblem for Diggie boosts damage and utility:
	Magic Power increases skill damage.
        Agility for movement speed
	Cooldown Reduction allows more frequent skill usage.
	Impure Rage or Magic Shockwave enhances damage through skills or boosts magic power after hitting an enemy.

equips.equip_desc: Magic boots and Enchanted talisman for cool down reduction, glowing wand antiheal, bloodwings extra damage and additional protection, divine glaive for penetration. Lastly holy crystal for extra damage. Full damage build

hero.hero_overview:
Diggie is a support hero in Mobile Legends known for his utility and anti-crowd control abilities. His strengths include:
Anti-Crowd Control (Time Journey - Ultimate): Removes and prevents crowd control effects for allies.Vision Control (Auto Alarm Bomb - 1st Skill): Provides zoning and map awareness.
Survivability (Young Again - Passive): Turns into an egg after death, allowing him to scout enemies.
Peeling & Protection: His skills help protect allies from burst damage and assassins.
hero.hero_strength: Diggie is a powerful support hero in Mobile Legends with strong utility and anti-crowd control abilities. His ultimate grants CC immunity, countering heavy-control teams. His Auto Alarm Bombs provide vision, zoning, and poke damage. His passive allows him to stay active after death, tracking enemies and preventing escapes. He excels in team protection, disrupting enemies, and denying surprise ganks with his vision control.
hero.hero_weakness: Diggie is a squishy support with low durability and limited damage. His Time Journey requires precise timing, and he struggles against burst heroes. While his passive keeps him active after death, enemies can track his egg form, reducing his vision advantage.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker  Offers repositioning, which can be crucial for quickly getting into position to activate Time Journey or Reverse Time and escape dangerous situations.
